title: Raid Fines
description: A World of Warcraft raid fine management system. Players accrue fines for infractions during raid, officers log fines, and players view their balance.
descriptionDa: Et World of Warcraft raid-bødesystem. Spillere opkræves bøder for overtrædelser under raid, officers logger bøder, og spillere kan se deres saldo.

title: Web Crawler
description: A configurable web crawler with visual output. Crawls a target domain, maps URL relationships, and renders an interactive D3.js network visualization.
descriptionDa: En konfigurerbar webcrawler med visuel output. Crawler et måldomæne, kortlægger URL-relationer og renderer en interaktiv D3.js netværksvisualisering.
